name: gpusmarket-host
description: List your GPU on GPUsMarket in one command. Auto-installs Ollama or llama.cpp, pulls models, connects tunnel.

scripts.build: javascript-obfuscator src/detect.js --output dist/detect.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.5 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.2 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --rename-globals false --self-defending false --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --target node && javascript-obfuscator src/recommend.js --output dist/recommend.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.5 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.2 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --rename-globals false --self-defending false --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --target node && javascript-obfuscator src/installer.js --output dist/installer.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.5 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.2 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --rename-globals false --self-defending false --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --target node && javascript-obfuscator src/modelPuller.js --output dist/modelPuller.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.5 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.2 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --rename-globals false --self-defending false --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --target node && javascript-obfuscator src/serverManager.js --output dist/serverManager.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.5 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.2 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --rename-globals false --self-defending false --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --target node && javascript-obfuscator src/tunnel.js --output dist/tunnel.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.5 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.2 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --rename-globals false --self-defending false --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --target node

author: Joe Wee <joe@tyga.cloud>
